citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:20 pm on 18
February 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee/registrant by honking several times, all calling all three
numbers the inspector had for the licensee. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is
a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement
action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b)  Repeat
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:20 pm on 18 
February 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee/registrant by honking several times, all calling all three 
numbers the inspector had for the licensee. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is 
a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement 
action. 
 
 
End Section
